scripts.test:smoke: yarn playwright install && npx playwright test --headed --project smokeChromium --grep @smoke
scripts.test:LegalOfficerAdminDetainedAppellantI: yarn playwright install && npx playwright test --headed --project chromium --grep @LegalOfficerAdminDetainedAppellantInPersonICC
scripts.test:LegalAdminDetainedRepresentedToNonD: yarn playwright install && npx playwright test --headed --project chromium --grep @LegalAdminDetainedRepresentedToNonDetainedICC
scripts.test:LegalAdminDetainedRepresentedICC: yarn playwright install && npx playwright test --headed --project chromium --grep @LegalAdminDetainedRepresentedICC
scripts.test:LegalRepCreatesDetainedRepresented: yarn playwright install && npx playwright test --headed --project chromium --grep @LegalRepCreatesDetainedRepresented
scripts.test:DetainedRepresentedAdminEndsTheAppe: yarn playwright install && npx playwright test --headed --project chromium --grep @DetainedRepresentedAdminEndsTheAppeal
scripts.test:NonDetainedToDetainedRepresented: yarn playwright install && npx playwright test --headed --project chromium --grep @NonDetainedToDetainedRepresented
scripts.test:OutOfCountryAsLegalRep: yarn playwright install && npx playwright test --headed --project chromium --grep @OutOfCountryAsLegalRep
scripts.test: yarn lint && yarn validate:json && node bin/case-event-to-fields-duplicate-checker.js && node bin/check-missing-system-user-fields.js && node bin/auth-casefield-duplicate-checker.js
scripts.test:a11y: echo 'Accessibility testing skipped - no tests configured yet'
scripts.generate-dev: bin/generate-ccd-definition.sh -e dev && node bin/case-event-to-fields-duplicate-checker.js && node bin/check-missing-system-user-fields.js && node bin/auth-casefield-duplicate-checker.js
scripts.generate-all: yarn generate-dev && yarn generate-demo && yarn generate-ithc && yarn generate-perftest && yarn generate-aat && yarn generate-prod
scripts.upload: yarn generate-dev && USER_TOKEN=$(${CCD_DOCKER_PATH}/bin/idam-user-token.sh) && SERVICE_TOKEN=$(${CCD_DOCKER_PATH}/bin/idam-service-token.sh) && curl http://127.0.0.1:4451/import -H "Authorization: Bearer ${USER_TOKEN}" -H "ServiceAuthorization: Bearer ${SERVICE_TOKEN}" -F file="@target/appeal/xlsx/ccd-appeal-config-dev.xlsx" && echo ''
scripts.upload-wa: yarn generate-dev && USER_TOKEN=$(${WA_KUBE_ENV_PATH}/scripts/actions/idam-user-token.sh) && SERVICE_TOKEN=$(${WA_KUBE_ENV_PATH}/scripts/actions/idam-service-token.sh) && curl http://ccd-definition-store-api/import -H "Authorization: Bearer ${USER_TOKEN}" -H "ServiceAuthorization: Bearer ${SERVICE_TOKEN}" -F file="@target/appeal/xlsx/ccd-appeal-config-dev.xlsx" && echo ''
